creator: mwest@uct.ac.za
text:
This diff will upgrade the previously submitted shar archive to 
tvark 0.2.

The "files" directory and contents should be removed.

diff -ruN tvark-old/Makefile tvark/Makefile
--- tvark-old/Makefile	Thu Jul 19 14:07:41 2001
+++ tvark/Makefile	Sun Jul 22 02:41:16 2001
@@ -6,10 +6,9 @@
 #
 
 PORTNAME=	tvark
-PORTVERSION=	0.01
+PORTVERSION=	0.2
 CATEGORIES=	net
 MASTER_SITES=	http://www.tvark.com/
-DISTNAME=	tvark-alpha
 
 MAINTAINER=	mwest@uct.ac.za
 
diff -ruN tvark-old/distinfo tvark/distinfo
--- tvark-old/distinfo	Thu Jul 19 13:34:42 2001
+++ tvark/distinfo	Sun Jul 22 02:41:42 2001
@@ -1 +1 @@
-MD5 (tvark-alpha.tar.gz) = d95f1f7fb04f5aaba16f5a49ae74bce3
+MD5 (tvark-0.2.tar.gz) = 491312842a2a8b97e8082d3aa8faf797
